item.title: 🇮🇱 Jerusalem Post Live: Trump Calls Iran Peace Plan "Unacceptable", US Escorts Ships Through Hormuz
item.description: Trump rejected Iran's 14-point peace proposal and announced US military will escort stranded vessels through the Strait of Hormuz starting Monday. Israel plans major F-35 and F-15 fleet expansion.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Europe's Fear: Putin's "Window of Opportunity" to Test NATO Commitment
item.description: European governments worry the next two years present Russia with the ideal moment to probe Western resolve on NATO defense commitments amid US distraction with Iran.

item.title: 🇦🇺🇯🇵 Australia-Japan Defense Dilemma: Indispensable to US But Not Dependent
item.description: Japanese PM Takaichi's Australia visit highlights a shared challenge: maintaining US alliance value while building independent security capabilities in an uncertain geopolitical environment.

item.title: 🇫🇮🇸🇪 Nordic Nuclear Shift: Finland Opens, Sweden Seeks Own Umbrella
item.description: Finland and Sweden, long neutral outside military alliances, are rethinking nuclear deterrence strategies. Finland opens to nuclear discussions while Sweden explores independent deterrent options.

item.title: 🇦🇲🇨🇦 European, Canadian Leaders Gather in Yerevan Amid Trump Shadow
item.description: European leaders and Canadian PM Mark Carney meet in Armenia as they navigate complex diplomacy in the shadow of Trump's policies and regional tensions.

item.title: 🚢 Trump Announces "Project Freedom" to Escort Ships Through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The US will launch a military-backed operation to guide stranded commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz, with 15,000 personnel and over 100 aircraft committed to the effort as the Iran conflict continues.

item.title: 🇮🇳 Indian Rupee and Bonds Face Pressure from Prolonged US-Iran Conflict
item.description: Stalled efforts to resolve the US-Iran conflict are keeping oil prices elevated, straining capital flows into energy-importing India as the rupee and government bonds face fresh pressure.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC+ Output Increase Symbolic but Significant Amid Hormuz Crisis
item.description: The seven remaining OPEC+ members agreed to increase output for a third straight month in June, though analysts say the boost is largely symbolic given supply disruptions from the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: ⛪ Rubio to Meet Pope Leo in Rome Following Trump Criticism
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio will travel to Italy this week to meet Pope Leo, weeks after President Trump criticized the pontiff, in an effort to repair diplomatic relations.

item.title: 🌏 ADB Launches Finance Scheme for Critical Mineral Supply Chains
item.description: The Asian Development Bank unveiled a new financing mechanism to help Asia-Pacific nations develop supply chains for critical minerals used in clean energy, batteries, and electric vehicles.

item.title: 📈 Asian Stocks Hit Record High as Tech Rally Offsets Middle East Tensions
item.description: Asian equities excluding Japan reached an all-time high as technology stocks rallied, with investors shrugging off ongoing geopolitical uncertainty in the Middle East.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah's Struggle to Reverse Fortunes After Heavy Losses
item.description: Hezbollah is paying a steep price in its battle to reverse deteriorating battlefield conditions, facing significant challenges to its military capabilities and regional influence.

item.title: 🇲🇦 Two US Troops Missing During African Lion Exercise in Morocco
item.description: Two US military personnel are missing during the African Lion training exercise in Morocco, according to US Africa Command, as search and rescue operations continue.

item.title: 🇵🇱 Poland Sees No Signals of Patriot Delivery Delays
item.description: Poland has not received any indications of delays in its Patriot missile system deliveries, officials said, amid concerns about defense procurement timelines in Europe.

item.title: 🇨🇳 US Calls Taiwan "Trusted, Capable Partner" in Diplomatic Praise
item.description: The United States praised Taiwan as a trusted and capable partner while highlighting its diplomatic ties with Eswatini, reinforcing US support for the island democracy.

item.title: 🌬️ Trump Administration Halts US Wind Farm Projects Over National Security
item.description: The Trump administration cited national security concerns to halt multiple US wind farm projects, marking a significant shift in energy policy priorities.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Damage in Moscow After Ukrainian Drone Strike Hits Residential Building
item.description: Ukrainian drones struck a residential building in Moscow, causing damage as drone warfare continues to reach deep into Russian territory.

item.title: 🚢 Suspected Hantavirus Outbreak on Atlantic Cruise Ship Kills 3
item.description: The World Health Organization reports three deaths from a suspected hantavirus outbreak aboard an Atlantic cruise ship as health authorities investigate.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia's Primorsk Port Hit as Ukraine Launches Wave of Drone Strikes
item.description: Ukraine launched a wave of drone strikes targeting Russia's Primorsk port, expanding attacks on Russian infrastructure and energy export facilities.

item.title: ☢️ IAEA: Drone Targeted Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant's External Radiation Monitoring
item.description: The International Atomic Energy Agency reported that a drone targeted the external radiation monitoring system at Ukraine's Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Nobel Laureate Mohammadi in Critical Condition, Iran Foundation Says
item.description: Nobel Peace Prize laureate Narges Mohammadi remains in critical condition in Iranian custody, according to a foundation monitoring her situation.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE Exits Arab Oil Exporter Group OAPEC
item.description: The United Arab Emirates has withdrawn from the Organization of Arab Petroleum Exporting Countries, reshaping Middle East energy diplomacy amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Yen Steady as Intervention Fears Linger with Japan Shut for Holidays
item.description: The Japanese yen held steady as markets watched for potential intervention, with Japan closed for holidays and currency authorities remaining vigilant.

item.title: 📺 CBS News Live: Iran War Coverage - Trump, Strait of Hormuz, Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire
item.description: CBS News provides continuous coverage of the Iran conflict including Trump's response, Hormuz developments, and ceasefire negotiations between Israel and Lebanon.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC Set for Third Output Hike Since Hormuz Closure
item.description: OPEC is set to agree on its third oil production increase since the Strait of Hormuz closure, as the cartel attempts to stabilize markets amid ongoing disruption.
